title: facter
html:
facter

Inherit

Context: sudo, unprivileged

FACTERLIB=/path/to/dir/ facter

Context: sudo, unprivileged

facter --custom-dir=/path/to/dir/ x
excerpt: facter Inherit Context: sudo, unprivileged FACTERLIB=/path/to/dir/ facter Context: sudo, unprivileged facter --custom-dir=/path/to/dir/ x
